occurrence_sentence: Matt Swayne
University of Southampton-led team of scientists at successfully detected a weak gravitational pull on a tiny particle using a new technique.
The experiment, published in the _Science Advances_ journal, used levitating magnets to detect gravity on microscopic particles – small enough to boarder on the quantum realm.
The experiment, published in the  _Science Advances_ journal, used levitating magnets to detect gravity on microscopic particles – small enough to boarder on the quantum realm.

interaction_phrase: conducted the experiment with scientists at
occurrence_sentence: Academics from Southampton conducted the experiment with scientists at Leiden University in the Netherlands and the Institute for Photonics and Nanotechnologies in Italy, with funding from the EU Horizon Europe EIC Pathfinder grant (QuCoM).

Academics from Southampton conducted the experiment with scientists at Leiden University in the Netherlands and the Institute for Photonics and Nanotechnologies in Italy, with funding from the EU Horizon Europe EIC Pathfinder grant (QuCoM).

interaction_phrase: worked as a science communicator for an R1 university
occurrence_sentence: With a several-decades long background in journalism and communications, Matt Swayne has worked as a science communicator for an R1 university for more than 12 years, specializing in translating high tech and deep tech for the general audience.
